meta.title: Venture Connect — Build Teams, Launch Projects
meta.description: The AI-powered business directory that helps you plan projects, find the right people, and build teams — globally.

landing.headline: Find the right people. Build the right team.
landing.subheadline: Venture Connect is a global business directory with an AI project planning agent that helps you scope projects, identify talent, and assemble teams — all in one platform.

features.title: Everything you need to launch a project
features.subtitle: From idea to assembled team in minutes — not weeks.

aiPlanning.title: AI Project Planning
aiPlanning.description: Describe your project idea and our AI agent generates a complete timeline with milestones, phases, tools, materials, and personnel requirements.

directory.title: Global Business Directory
directory.description: Search thousands of verified professionals by skill, location, availability, and expertise. Filter out recruiters and find real talent.

teamAssembly.title: Automated Team Assembly
teamAssembly.description: The AI agent matches your project needs to directory profiles, sends confidential outreach, and manages NDA workflows — automatically.

workspace.title: Secure Project Workspaces
workspace.description: Collaborate with your assembled team in private, invitation-only workspaces with milestones, file sharing, and real-time communication.

nda.title: Built-in NDA Workflow
nda.description: Project details stay confidential until candidates sign an NDA. No specifics are shared until you approve each team member.

meetings.title: Meeting Integration
meetings.description: Schedule physical, virtual, or hybrid meetings directly from any project workspace. Powered by Itinervate integration.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to assembled team in four steps.

step1.title: Describe your project
step1.description: Tell our AI agent about your project idea. It will ask clarifying questions to understand scope, timeline, and requirements.

step2.title: Review the plan
step2.description: The AI generates a detailed project timeline with milestones, phases, resource needs, and estimated personnel requirements.

step3.title: AI assembles your team
step3.description: The agent searches the directory for matching professionals, sends confidential outreach with NDAs, and manages responses.

step4.title: Collaborate and build
step4.description: Approved team members join your secure workspace. Track milestones, share files, and hold meetings — all in one place.

cta2.title: Ready to build something?
cta2.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who are finding teams, not jobs.

directory.title: Business Directory
directory.subtitle: Find professionals by skill, location, and availability
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, skill, or company...
directory.noResults: No professionals match your filters. Try broadening your search.

ai.plannerSubtitle: Describe your project idea and I'll create a detailed plan.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to build.
